response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced full-stack engineer with an extensive background in TypeScript, Node.js, and React. He possesses the explicitly requested, niche experience with AI-agent infrastructure (MCP) and has a very strong foundation in software craftsmanship, TDD, and cloud infrastructure, making him an outstanding candidate for this senior role despite missing explicit mentions of Nest.js.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience using the required primary stack technologies (TypeScript, Node.js, React).
Direct, hands-on experience developing AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators.
Deep expertise in software testing, TDD, and CI/CD, including creating custom testing frameworks.
concerns: Lacks explicit mention of Nest.js and Vitest, which are core to the primary stack.
Significant time spent on niche or older technologies (DLang, Ember.js) might dilute recent focus on the target stack.
Unusual and highly overlapping employment timelines will require clarification during the interview.
